name: Synergy Auto Bus
principals: Festus C Nwachukwu (Owner per source list)
recent_news: No public news or web presence found in 2025-2026 searches. Address (14403 Ella Blvd #1306, Houston) is a small multi-tenant building suggesting micro-operator or registered-agent address; no DOT 'Synergy Auto Bus' carrier surfaced (separate 'Synergy Transport Services LLC' is a freight carrier, different entity).
fit_notes: Sub-scale (~$1.5M, ~28 employees) Houston micro-operator with no discoverable web footprint, district contracts, or DOT record under this name. Low priority Summit tuck-in candidate unless on-the-ground confirmation reveals real route book; high risk it's a broker/charter shell, not a contracted Texas school-bus operator.

name: Sab School Transportation
recent_news: Not located in NJ DOE Contractor Code lists or NJSBCA member directory under this exact name in 2025-26 search. Address (371 Hoes Ln #200, Piscataway) is a multi-tenant office building near ESCNJ Transportation HQ; may be small Type II/SPED operator, registered agent, or recently renamed/dissolved entity.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm SAB is an active contracted NJ school-bus operator. NJ is a fragmented Type II / special-needs market that Summit (Durham) values, but until contractor code, route count, and ownership are verified this is a deferred lead — pull NJ DOE DRTRS code report and call to confirm before scoring.

name: Yakelin Marrero Sch Trnsprtn
recent_news: Listed in Manta directory as 'Yakelin Marrero School Transportation Inc.' at 2007 Kodiak Dr, Colorado Springs. No press, M&A, district contract list, or website discoverable; not affiliated with Durham, First Student, Beacon, or STA per public sources.
fit_notes: Small (~$1.5M, ~35 emp) owner-operator in Colorado Springs, an expansion market where Summit (ex-Durham) already has presence. Eponymous Hispanic-owned micro-operator typical of CO Spanish-speaking contractor / activity-bus niche. Worth a discreet outreach call for fleet size and contracts, but likely too sub-scale and informal to move the needle as standalone tuck-in.

name: Keller Edwin A Bus Svc
recent_news: NLRB Case 05-RC-289191 (filed Jan 2022; election May 5, 2022): Amalgamated Transit Union Local 689 won 29-9 vote to represent ~38 Charles County school bus drivers/attendants of Catherine A. Keller Inc. / Edwin A. Keller Bus Service Inc. — bargaining unit certified. Sister company to Keller Transportation Inc. (Ernest Keller Jr.'s 1956 spin-off from the original 1927 Keller family business).
fit_notes: Attractive Summit tuck-in: 60+ year multi-generational family operator on Charles County Public Schools (a long-tenured MD district), adjacent to/affiliated with Keller Transportation (1927 founding). Aging principals (Edwin Keller / Catherine Keller likely 70s+) and recent unionization (ATU 689, 2022) are classic succession triggers. MD is a Summit/Durham core state — strong cultural and route-density fit. Recommend coordinated outreach treating Edwin A. Keller and sister Catherine A. Keller / Keller Transportation as a combined target family.

name: School Bus Plant Co LLC
recent_news: No web presence, news, or district contracts found. Address 3045 S Jackson St is a residential address in Denver's University Hills (single-family home), strongly suggesting this is not an operating school-bus contractor. Likely an LLC organized around a single converted-bus venture (e.g., mobile retail, plant shop, RV conversion, or food bus) rather than a student transportation provider — name pattern matches Denver's 'The Plant Bus' mobile plant-retail concept.
fit_notes: Almost certainly NOT a student transportation operator — name and residential Denver address pattern indicate a converted-bus retail/lifestyle business misclassified by the source list. Recommend DROP from Summit tuck-in pipeline; do not pursue outreach.
